zh.lifeSummary: 當Aélis de Heilly於1237年3月17日出生在法國皮卡迪索姆海利時，她的父親Gauthier IV de Heilly20歲，母親Jeanne de Picquigny12歲。她於1254年6月14日與Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aélis de Heilly于1237年3月17日出生在法国皮卡迪索姆海利时，她的父亲Gauthier IV de Heilly20岁，母亲Jeanne de Picquigny12岁。她于1254年6月14日与Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brennan, Brigid, Ciaran, Conor, Kieran, Aidan, Aileen, Caitlin, Clancy, Colm, Conn.

variants.name: Reiley
meanings: Altered form of German Reile or of Reihle, avariant of Reil 2, 3.

variants.name: O'Reilly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Mairead, Aidan, Colm, Declan, Dermot, Dympna, Eamon, Finbar, Brennan, Brian Patrick, Brid.

Irish (Cavan, Meath): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach, a personal name of unexplained etymology. This is the name of a chieftain family in County Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly.

variants.name: Rahilly
meanings: Irish (Kerry and Cork): perhaps from Ó Raghailligh (see Reilly ), but more likely from the surname Ó Raithile ‘descendant of Raithile’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. This surname is common in Munster, where it is also Anglicized as O'Rahilly.

nameMeanings.name: Aélis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alice
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Aélis de Heilly was born on 17 March 1237, in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Gauthier IV de Heilly, was 20 and her mother, Jeanne de Picquigny, was 12. She married Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier on 14 June 1254, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1300, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aélis de Heilly est née le 17 mars 1237, à Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Gauthier IV de Heilly, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Picquigny, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier le 14 juin 1254, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aélis de Heilly am 17. März 1237 in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gauthier IV de Heilly 20 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Picquigny 12. Sie hat am 14. Juni 1254 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aélis de Heilly è nata il il 17 marzo 1237 nel Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Gauthier IV de Heilly, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Picquigny, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier il 14 giugno 1254, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1300, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aélis de Heillyが1237年3月17日にフランスピカーディソンメヘイリーで生まれた時，父Gauthier IV de Heillyは20歳，母Jeanne de Picquignyは12歳であった。1254年6月14日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンでBaudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aélis de Heilly(이)가 1237년 3월 17일 프랑스 피카디 솜 헤이리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gauthier IV de Heilly(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Picquigny(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1254년 6월 14일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aélis de Heilly nasceu em 17 de março de 1237, em Heilly, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Gauthier IV de Heilly, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Picquigny, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier em 14 de junho de 1254, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aélis de Heilly родилась 17 марта 1237 г. в местности хилли, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Gauthier IV de Heilly было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Picquigny, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier 14 июня 1254 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aélis de Heilly nació el 17 de marzo de 1237, en Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Gauthier IV de Heilly, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Picquigny, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Baudouin IV "le Preux" de Créquy Seigneur de Créquy, de Fressin et de Beaurainville , Chevalier el 14 de junio de 1254, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1300, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 63 años.
